worldData.instructions:
No controls — this world is watched, not driven.
Its laws arrive over HTTP as grafted rule fragments; forces superpose.

LAWS IN FORCE:
· none — matter drifts free

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: PROOF: the law interpreter — executes whatever rule fragments the book holds; grafts arrive via worldData.
